title: peer eval template
body:
# Peer Evaluation Template (Assessment 2)

## Team Member
- Name:
- Role(s):
- Main workstream:

## Rubric Scores (0-6)
1. Engagement & Participation (20%):
2. Technical Contribution (20%):
3. Communication & Collaboration (20%):
4. Timeliness & Reliability (20%):
5. Initiative & Critical Thinking (20%):

## Reflective Commentary (Required)
1. Most valuable contribution:
2. Any collaboration challenges and how addressed:
3. Should final grade differ from group grade? Why/why not:

## Evidence Notes
- Specific file(s), section(s), or analysis output this member contributed:
- Deadline reliability examples:
- Quality/rigor observations:

---

# Score Guidance
- 0 = Zero contribution
- 1 = Limited contribution
- 2 = Pass level
- 3 = Credit level
- 4 = Distinction level
- 5 = High Distinction level
- 6 = Perfect contribution
